reasons: Lolita can protect Bruno from ranged pressure and projectiles while creating space for him to trade safely.
Bruno can keep dealing damage from behind Lolita's frontline instead of exposing himself early.

proof.summary: Lolita shields Bruno from ranged basic attacks and projectiles, letting Bruno hold a safer lane or teamfight position.
worksBestWhen: Lolita positions between Bruno and incoming ranged damage.
Bruno keeps hitting from behind Lolita instead of stepping forward alone.
failureCases: Enemy divers bypass Lolita's shield angle.
Bruno moves outside Lolita's protection range.

reasons: Rafaela's heal and speed support help Bruno kite, chase after a successful trade, or disengage under pressure.
Bruno benefits from Rafaela's sustain because his gold-lane trades often depend on surviving short damage windows.

proof.summary: Rafaela extends Bruno's trading window by giving him recovery and movement support during lane skirmishes and teamfights.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela times her speed support when Bruno needs to chase or escape.
Bruno does not overextend beyond Rafaela's range.
failureCases: Bruno is burst before Rafaela can support him.
Rafaela is forced to use resources on another teammate.

reasons: Minotaur gives Bruno a frontline and healing support, while his crowd control creates safer damage windows.
Bruno can attack from behind Minotaur while Minotaur absorbs engage pressure.

proof.summary: Minotaur absorbs engage pressure and controls enemies, giving Bruno space to keep attacking from the backline.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur holds enemy divers away from Bruno.
Bruno follows Minotaur's control instead of starting the fight alone.
failureCases: Minotaur engages too deep and leaves Bruno exposed.
Enemy assassins reach Bruno from a side angle.

reasons: Tigreal can lock enemies long enough for Bruno to apply ranged burst damage safely.
Bruno can follow Tigreal's engage from the backline instead of entering the fight first.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the engage window, while Bruno follows with ranged damage on controlled enemies.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal catches targets inside Bruno's attack range.
Bruno keeps safe spacing behind the frontline.
failureCases: Tigreal engages when Bruno is not ready.
Bruno is zoned away by enemy flankers.

reasons: Angela can protect Bruno during focused dives, helping him survive long enough to keep dealing damage.
Bruno benefits from Angela's defensive support when enemy assassins commit onto him.

proof.summary: Angela adds defensive support when Bruno is targeted, reducing the chance that he is removed before his damage matters.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves her ultimate for enemy dive timing.
Bruno has enough space to continue attacking after being protected.
failureCases: Bruno is caught by chain crowd control before Angela can react.
Angela attaches to Bruno while he is already too far out of position.
